query:
INSERT INTO divine_stem_modules (name, slug, description, ceremonialTitle, iconEmoji, category, orderIndex, status) VALUES
('Science of Origin & Observation', 'science-origin-observation', 'Indigenous cosmology, biology, environmental science. Understanding the natural world through ancestral wisdom.', 'The Scroll of Earth & Sky', '🔭', 'stem', 1, 'active'),
('Mathematics of Sacred Geometry', 'mathematics-sacred-geometry', 'Arithmetic, algebra, and divine geometry. Numbers as the language of creation.', 'The Scroll of Divine Patterns', '🧮', 'stem', 2, 'active'),
('Technology of Light & Code', 'technology-light-code', 'Coding, robotics, AI ethics, digital creation. Building with the tools of tomorrow.', 'The Scroll of Digital Fire', '💻', 'stem', 3, 'active'),
('Engineering of Purpose', 'engineering-purpose', 'Maker projects, energy systems, restoration technologies. Creating solutions for sovereign communities.', 'The Scroll of Sacred Building', '🔧', 'stem', 4, 'active'),
('Living Earth & Ancestral Farming', 'living-earth-farming', 'Gardening, soil science, land knowledge. Reconnecting with the earth that sustains us.', 'The Scroll of Root & Seed', '🌿', 'stem', 5, 'active'),
('Spirit Writing & Air Chants', 'spirit-writing-chants', 'Literacy, poetry, history, sound & voicework. The power of word and breath.', 'The Scroll of Voice & Memory', '✍🏽', 'creative', 6, 'active'),
('Entrepreneurial Flame', 'entrepreneurial-flame', 'Child-led business building using LuvLedger-style tools. Sovereignty through economic self-determination.', 'The Scroll of Wealth Creation', '🎓', 'entrepreneurial', 7, 'active'),
('House of Many Tongues', 'house-many-tongues', 'Global flame-language chamber for restoring, learning, and honoring sacred and world tongues.', 'The Voice of Many Lands', '🌍', 'language', 8, 'active'),
('Ceremonial Arts & Creative Flame', 'ceremonial-arts', 'Art, music, dance, and sacred expression. Honoring creativity as spiritual practice.', 'The Scroll of Sacred Expression', '🎨', 'ceremonial', 9, 'active')
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE name = VALUES(name);
